name: liquid_handler
description: Submit a candidate molecule to the lab's automated liquid handler (Hamilton STARlet) to queue a real synthesis run. Returns a batch_id needed for all downstream lab tools (hplc_qc, nmr_qc, plate_reader). Call AFTER score_synthesizability confirms the route is feasible. The natural next tool is hplc_qc to verify the synthesis worked. Do NOT call this twice on the same molecule (it allocates physical reagent inventory).

target_smiles.description: Canonical SMILES of the molecule to synthesize.

route_notes.description: Optional one-line description of the planned synthesis route.
